column1: # Nano Sweep 09 — Fork replication at best-known gate + variance seeding (2026-04-22)
# After s08 maps fork outcome across different ENABLE_LOOPING_AT positions.
# This sweep tests reliability: does fork converge on the same winner across 4 seeds at
# If yes -> fork is reliable, Phase B can build on it
# If no -> fork is noisy, need bigger probe_steps or averaging
# 4 runs x 300 steps x ~45 min = ~3 hrs.
